steps.title: Learner starts in Canvas
steps.detail: The demo begins as the enrolled student in the real Canvas LMS course, not on an ElevenID marketing page.

steps.title: Canvas course context is active
steps.detail: The learner is enrolled in ElevenID LTI Test Course, which contains the launch assignment and quiz-backed badge scenario.

steps.title: Canvas launches ElevenID through LTI
steps.detail: The assignment is an external tool placement, so Canvas sends a signed LTI launch instead of a hand-built link.

steps.title: LTI launch is verified and bound
steps.detail: ElevenID validates the Canvas launch, resolves the Canvas Platform and Program Binding, and selects the correct credential application.

steps.title: Normal credential application is preselected
steps.detail: The Canvas launch opens the regular credential application surface with the correct template, course, learner, and activity already bound.

steps.title: Canvas is source context, not a custom form
steps.detail: The learner reviews course details from Canvas while ElevenID keeps the normal application flow and issuer-controlled requirements.

steps.title: AGS quiz score becomes policy input
steps.detail: The seeded demo submits a signed Canvas AGS score event. MIP normalizes it into an EvidenceFact and Cedar permits approval.

steps.title: Learner sees the badge in My Identity
steps.detail: The Canvas-earned badge appears as a normal learner credential/application, with badge artwork, claim state, source context, and mirror delivery metadata.

steps.title: Credential details include Canvas source and delivery
steps.detail: The details modal separates application status from claim status and shows Canvas course source plus Canvas Credentials mirror delivery when present.

steps.title: Switching to issuer admin
steps.detail: The learner flow stays separate from organization administration. The recorder now signs in as Canvas Demo Admin for setup, destination, and verification screens.

steps.title: Issuer admin session is active
steps.detail: Signed in as Canvas Demo Admin with Marty organization access.

steps.title: Credential template owns destinations
steps.detail: Canvas Credentials is shown as an organization-managed destination for this badge, not a student wallet. Projection policy limits Canvas to the public badge view.

steps.title: Canvas platform and program bindings are managed
steps.detail: Admins configure Canvas trust, LTI launch binding, course/activity scope, feature gates, evidence requirements, and Canvas Credentials provider settings from the console.

steps.title: Provider secrets stay outside Canvas
steps.detail: Canvas Credentials API tokens are saved as managed organization secrets; bindings keep only a secret reference plus issuer and badgeclass IDs.

steps.title: Canvas standards breadth is surfaced
steps.detail: The integration now tracks LTI Deep Linking, AGS score evidence, NRPS roster/role context, and feature gates per Canvas program binding.

steps.title: Canvas destination sandbox shows the badge
steps.detail: This beta page simulates the external Canvas Credentials destination while the canonical credential stays in ElevenID.

steps.title: Mirror is delivery metadata
steps.detail: The mirrored record carries the canonical credential ID, issuer DID, subject DID, and Canvas account context.

steps.title: Canvas mirror provenance is in the console
steps.detail: The support lookup now lives in the organization verification console, so Canvas mirror resolution is part of the normal admin workflow.

steps.title: Issuer identity stays external
steps.detail: The issuer DID and remote-key-backed Marty identity remain outside Canvas while Canvas receives a useful badge mirror.

steps.title: Employer uses Credential Verification
steps.detail: The product verification path is the organization console: select a saved verification flow or presentation policy, then generate an OID4VP request.

steps.title: OID4VP request starts from policy
steps.detail: The verifier can start from a saved verification flow, generate a wallet request, and see Open Badge trust, status, claims, and Canvas mirror metadata in the result.
